briefs.title: Council to consider Land Acknowledgement at Delta meeting
briefs.summary: Delta Council will consider a Land Acknowledgement as part of its April 27, 2026 meeting agenda. A Land Acknowledgement is a formal statement recognizing the Indigenous peoples whose traditional territory the meeting takes place on. No business regulations or operational changes are proposed under this agenda item.

briefs.title: Council to consider: Delta approves its April 27, 2026 meeting agenda
briefs.summary: Delta Council is set to vote on endorsing the official agenda for its April 27, 2026 Regular Council meeting. This is a routine procedural step — it simply confirms the list of items Council will discuss that day and does not involve any new rules or requirements for businesses.
